/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/MicroVectorEditor_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/svgparser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/getAttributeValue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/toInt.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/Canvas.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/Hexagon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/mousePressEvent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/mouseMoveEvent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/mouseReleaseEvent.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/undo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/redo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/Circle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/Rectangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/Line.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/FreeHand.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/Text.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/Objects.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/setupToolBar.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/setupMenus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MicroVectorEditor.dir/src/roundedrectangle.cpp.o -o MicroVectorEditor.app/Contents/MacOS/MicroVectorEditor -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
